set.name: BHGH
set.longname: Bree Hive Gaming Hub Custom Cards

card.name: Ailene, The Unliving Exception
card.text: When a d20 is rolled, Ailene may trigger the triggered ability of any legendary creature controlled by you or in your command zone.

card.name: Caligrade, Guardsman
card.text: Whenever you deal combat damage with Caligrade, put a Quest Counter onto Caligrade. {R}{R}, Spend 3 Quest Counters: Exile Caligrade, then return him to the battlefield transformed under its owner's control.

card.name: Caligrade, Flame of Imorcia
card.text: Menace, Vigilance. Whenever Caligrade, Flame of Imorcia deals combat damage to a Player, add 1 Quest Counter. Whenever Caligrade, Flame of Imorcia would be destroyed, you may instead transform him.

card.name: Crystal, The Cycle Unforgotten
card.text: When you cast a non-creature spell, roll a d20, then summon a creature token based on the result. 1-5 | Create a 1/1 Squirrel Creature Token with Haste. 6-10 | Create a 1/1 Bird Creature Token with Flying. 11-17 | Create a 1/1 Snake Creature token with Deathtouch. 18-20 | Create a 4/4 Elemental Creature token with Vigilance and Reach. Partner - Chaos.

card.name: Mizo, The Forgotten Disorder
card.text: Once per turn, when you roll a d20, Mizo also rolls a d20, then trigger an ability based on the result. If this effect was triggered by Crystal, she instead rolls 2 d20s, and picks either result. 1 | Remove all counters from creatures. If this option was picked, Mizo and Crystal keep their counters until end of turn. 2-10 | Put a +1/+1 counter on Mizo, she gains Trample until end of turn. 11-19 | Put a +1/+1 counter on all of target player's creatures, Proliferate. 20 | Create a token copy of Mizo, except it is not legendary. Partner - Chaos

card.name: Elise De La Serre
card.text: All creatures have disguise, where the cost is their mana value. Initial cost to disguise is reduced by 1. The first time you flip over a card each turn, draw one card.

card.name: Madeline, Mountain Climber
card.text: Vigilance. When Madeline enters, create Celeste Mountain, a legendary colorless Mountain land token with "Whenever one or more legendary creatures attack, manifest dread." 1: Madeline can't be blocked this turn and gains ward 1 until end of turn.

card.name: Link, Hero of Hyrule
card.text: Vigilance, Trample. Whenever Link, Hero of Hyrule enters or attacks, you may play target plotted aura or equipment without paying its mana cost, and attach it to target creature. Creatures you control have, "Whenever you play a plotted card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This triggers only once each turn."

card.name: Zelda, Princess of Hyrule
card.text: Lifelink. Cards in your hand have plot. The plot cost is equal to its mana cost. At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have three or more cards plotted, transform Zelda, Princess of Hyrule.

card.name: The Light Dragon
card.text: Flying, Lifelink. Cards in your hand have plot. The plot cost is equal to its mana cost. Whenever you plot a card or play a plotted card, draw a card.

card.name: Exodia The Forbidden One
card.text: When Exodia the Forbidden One enters the battlefield, if you control cards named Left and Right Arm of the Forbidden One and Left and Right Leg of the Forbidden One: You Win the Game.

card.name: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
Right Arm of the Forbidden One
Left Leg of the Forbidden One
Right Leg of the Forbidden One
